name: io.github.codespar/mcp-itau
description: MCP server for Itaú Unibanco — Brazil's largest private bank. Pix, Cobrança (boleto), Arrecadação, and Extrato via Itaú's Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: ITAU_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Itaú OAuth client_id issued via the Developer Portal after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: ITAU_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2.

environmentVariables.name: ITAU_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
